metadata.description: FontLab 6 API wrapper with enhanced functionality for glyph editing, font management, and automation

naming.p*: Basic proxy - wraps single FL object
naming.e*: Extended proxy - adds advanced functionality to p*
naming.TR*: Action collector - static methods for batch operations

naked.naked=True: Returns raw FL object (flNode, flContour, etc.)

updateObject.description: Updates FL object with undo support

pNode.description: Proxy to flNode - represents a single point in a contour

args.name: naked
args.description: Return raw flNode if True, pNode if False

getOn.description: Get on-curve node at this position

getMaxY.description: Get node with maximum Y between prev/next on-curve

getMinY.description: Get node with minimum Y between prev/next on-curve

getSegment.description: Get segment at position (relative to current time)

getSegmentNodes.description: Get all nodes in segment (2 for line, 4 for curve)

args.name: time
args.description: Time offset from current position (0-1 range)

insertAfterDist.description: Insert node at distance from current position

insertBeforeDist.description: Insert node at distance before current position

shift.description: Shift node by delta (moves node only)

smartReloc.description: Move node and adjacent BCPs to absolute coordinates

smartShift.description: Shift node and adjacent BCPs by delta

getSmartAngle.description: Get smart angle state and radius

examples.code:
node = pNode(fl_node)
print(node.x, node.y)
node.x = 100
node.smooth = True

next_node = current.getNext(naked=False)  # Returns pNode
raw_next = current.getNext(naked=True)  # Returns flNode

eNode.description: Extended pNode with advanced geometric operations

asCoord.description: Return Coord object of node position

getNextLine.description: Line from node to next on-curve

getPrevLine.description: Line from prev on-curve to node

shiftFromNext.description: Move relative to next node position

shiftFromPrev.description: Move relative to prev node position

polarReloc.description: Move to (angle, distance) from current position

cornerLoopToTargets.description: Loop corner extending toward target position

interpShift.description: Interpolated nudge - moves with curve bias

examples.code:
node = eNode(selected_node)
node.cornerRound(size=10, curvature=[1,1])
glyph.updateObject(glyph.fl, 'Round corner')
node.polarReloc(angle=45, distance=50)  # Move 50 units at 45 degrees

pGlyph.description: Proxy to flGlyph and fgGlyph - represents a single glyph

layer.description: Get layer by name/index, or active layer

isEmpty.description: strong=True: all layers empty; strong=False: any layer empty

selectedAtContours.description: Selected nodes as (contour_idx, node_idx) or (contour, node)

drawPoints.description: Draw glyph using point pen protocol

mapNodes2Times.description: Map contour/node indices to contour times

examples.code:
glyph = pGlyph()  # Current glyph
glyph.name = 'newName'
nodes = glyph.nodes(layer='Regular', extend=eNode)
for node in nodes:
    node.shift(10, 0)
glyph.updateObject(glyph.fl, 'Shift nodes')

glyph = pGlyph()
selected = glyph.selectedAtContours(index=True)
# Returns: [(contour_idx, node_idx), ...]
for cID, nID in selected:
    contour = glyph.contours()[cID]
    node = contour.nodes()[nID]

glyph = pGlyph()
lsb = glyph.getLSB()
adv = glyph.getAdvance()
glyph.setAdvance(adv + 50)
glyph.updateObject(glyph.fl, 'Widen glyph')

eGlyph.description: Extended pGlyph with multi-layer processing tools

args.name: layers
args.description: Layer control tuple (active, masters, masks, services) or list of layer names

_prepareLayers.description: Internal: Prepare layer names for tools. Filters banned layers ('#', 'img'). Returns list of layer names.

_compatibleLayers.description: Internal: Check layer compatibility with reference layer

pFont.description: Proxy to fgFont and flPackage - represents a font

glyph.description: Get glyph by name or index

examples.code:
font = pFont()
glyph = font.glyph('A')
for glyph in font.uppercase():
    print(glyph.name)

font = pFont()
kern = font.kerning()
font.add_kerning_group('@KR1', ['A', 'V'], 'L')
pairs = font.kerning_dump(pairs_only=True)

pNodesContainer.description: Container for multiple nodes with batch operations

isCurve.description: True if cubic, False if line

pWorkspace.description: Proxy to flWorkspace - current application state

pTextBlock.description: Proxy to flTextBlock - text editing block

node_insert_dlg.description: Insert node with dialog for time parameter

nodes_copy.description: Copy selected nodes to clipboard bank

getProcessGlyphs.description: Get glyphs for processing based on mode

OutlinePen.usage_example:
pen = OutlinePen(offset=20, connection='round')
glyph.draw(pen)
inner, outer, _ = pen.getShapes()

layer_control_tuple.description: Used to specify which layers to process

undo_pattern.description: Always use updateObject for undo-enabled changes
